title: Id::from_trusted doc does not warn against user input
description: Id::from_trusted() doc says 'source is trusted (e.g. server-assigned IDs)' but does not explicitly say 'do not pass user-controlled strings.' A contributor adding a feature that accepts user input could call from_trusted() on it without recognizing the hazard. Suggested addition: 'Do not pass strings from user input or untrusted external sources; use Id::new() instead.' The name alone is insufficient.
